## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`type: subject`)
- [ ] `mage check` passes locally (lint + race tests + govulncheck)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Public API changes documented (godoc) and, if applicable, noted for the changelog
